2606.26494.title: Clinical Harness for Governable Medical AI Skill Ecosystems
2606.26494.paper_summary: Medical AI remains organized around isolated models, whereas care requires accountable capabilities that persist across time. We define clinical AI skills and propose the Clinical Harness, a runtime governance architecture that registers, orchestrates, constrains and monitors them. Using osteoporosis as an exemplar, we show how knowledge-driven, data-driven and physics-enhanced skills can support lifecycle care and provide a governed substrate for future medical agents.
2606.26494.paper_summary_zh: 醫療人工智慧仍然圍繞著孤立的模型組織，而護理需要持續存在的可負責能力。我們定義了臨床人工智慧技能，並提出了臨床治理架構，這是一種運行時治理架構，用於註冊、協調、約束和監控這些技能。以骨質疏鬆症為例，我們展示了知識驅動、數據驅動和物理增強的技能如何支持生命周期護理，並為未來的醫療代理提供一個受治理的基礎。
2606.26494.author: Tianhan Xu et.al.
2606.26494.authors: Tianhan Xu, Lei Bao, Zhe Hu, Tian Shen, Yongxiang Wang
